title: Cooling Relief Cap
body_html:
Cool down, reset, and shut the world out for a moment.

The Cooling Relief Cap is a soft, stretch-fit gel cap designed for moments when your head feels overheated, tense, or overstimulated. Keep it in the fridge or freezer, pull it on in seconds, and enjoy a cooling wraparound feel around the forehead, temples, eyes, and head.

Why people buy it

  • Instant cooling feel for long screen days, hot afternoons, and overstimulated evenings
  • Soft stretch fit that wraps comfortably around the head and eyes
  • Light-blocking design for rest, decompression, and quiet reset time
  • Reusable and easy to store in the fridge or freezer whenever you need it
  • No cables, no batteries, no setup

Best for

  • Post-work wind-down
  • After long laptop or phone sessions
  • Hot days and overheated evenings
  • Self-care routines
  • Relaxing in a darker, cooler environment

How to use

  1. Place the cap in the refrigerator or freezer for at least 10 minutes.
  2. Pull it over the head so it covers the forehead, temples, and eyes as desired.
  3. Relax for 10-20 minutes and let the cooling compression do the rest.

Product details

  • Material: elastic fabric + gel filling
  • Reusable cold or warm compress design
  • Non-electric
  • Portable and travel-friendly
  • Available colors: Pink and Black

FAQs

How long should I chill it?
For best results, leave it in the fridge or freezer for at least 10 minutes before use.

Can I use it warm as well?
Yes. It can also be used as a warm compress following safe heating instructions.

Does it block light?
Yes. The pull-down design can help create a darker, more relaxing environment.

Is it reusable?
Yes. It is designed to be reused again and again.

Is it electric?
No. No batteries, charging, or cables needed.
